MARAUDER_MARKS: Mark of Arkhar — the Dog (Khorne · Bloodfather, no magic)

seer: A Seer of Tchar starts with TWO spells from the Tchar Rituals - one chosen freely, the second determined randomly.
leader: The Hero becomes a spellcaster and immediately learns ONE random spell from the Tchar Rituals. He suffers -1 on all Difficulty rolls unless he was a wizard before.

seer: Uses the Shornaal Rituals. If not taken out of action, instead of searching for rare items he may brew a strong drink for the warband (treat as Bugman's Ale). It may never be sold.
leader: Enemy models that are not immune to psychology may not attack him in close combat unless they pass a Leadership test on 3D6 (discard the lowest die). If failed, they are hit automatically in close combat; once passed, no further test is needed that battle.

seer: Uses the Onogal Rituals and is immune to poison. With the Mutation skill he may take a Blessing of Nurgle instead.
leader: +1 Toughness, immune to poison, and he may re-roll once on the Serious Injuries table.

seer: Uses the Chaos Rituals. The warband may include 0-3 Gors (counting towards the 15-model maximum); re-roll every 'The Lad's Got Talent' result for them.
leader: Friendly models within 6 inches (12 with Battle Tongue) may re-roll failed Leadership tests.

seer: A Seer with the Mark of Arkhar is a war-priest and CANNOT cast spells. Instead he communes through visions: take a Leadership test each time he takes an enemy out of action in hand-to-hand combat - if passed, add +1 WS, S, T or I until the end of the battle (each characteristic only once). A Bloodfather may also take Strength skills.
leader: Subject to Frenzy. His save against magic increases to 2+ and he is immune to the effects of all Chaos rituals (including Rituals of Hashut).
